Mr. Nobody

"Nothing is real, everything is possible."

7.8
2009MOVIEReleased

Synopsis

Nemo Nobody leads an ordinary existence with his wife and 3 children; one day, he wakes up as a mortal centenarian in the year 2092.

Tags

time travelsurrealismtimechoicefree willmultiple storylinescuriousshockingcomplexloving2090sdepressingambiguousirreversible processentropy
